attachments.fallback: Fix for Outlook 2019/2021 ".pst cannot be opened" Error - @webbyalok (Alok)
attachments.text:
If your Outlook 2019 or 2021 is crashing due to a corrupt PST, don’t panic. There is a standard recovery workflow you should follow:

The Free First Attempt: Use Microsoft’s built-in ScanPST.exe (Inbox Repair Tool). You can find it in your Office installation folder (typically root\Office16). It works for minor header glitches.

The Risk Factor: Be aware that ScanPST often fails with files lar…
